positive: A mystical forest scene illustration centered on a crescent moon phase. The design features interconnected flora, including stylized mushrooms, ferns, and delicate vines, surrounding a glowing celestial map of constellations. Style should be highly detailed, high-contrast, two-tone line art resembling a modern woodcut etching or vintage botanical print. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, forest teal, and gold accents. The composition must be balanced and symmetrical, optimized for a central graphic print on fabric. Clean silhouette, strong outlines, graphic vector style, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, poorly drawn, cropped, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, solid background, photorealism, gradients
